title: 1. XiaSanHuang (77.18, 19, 21) 针下三皇（加中极更佳）。
text:
Balanitis (i.e. inflammation of the head and foreskin of the penis) is generally treated with XiaSanHuang, together with ZhongJi, DaDun or
XingJian. Being the Sprint and Fire point of the liver meridian, XingJian is an important point for cystitis and
urethritis. Since HuoYing is close to XingJian, this point can also be used. Both XingJian and HuoYing are also
effective for glaucoma.
